heading: Regulation of operations
label: 5216 Regulation of operations
text: For general provisions relating to operations on bonded premises see part I of this subchapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5216, , , related to “mash, wort and vinegar; vinegar factories”, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .
